title: Conditions schema
description: Structured weather and track conditions stored as validated JSONB in core.events.conditions. Enables analytical correlation of lap times with environmental factors.

Conditions.description: Weather and track surface conditions at the time of a track event. All fields are optional — riders record what they have. The notes field captures anything not covered by structured fields.

temp_c.description: Ambient air temperature in Celsius at the time of the event

track_temp_c.description: Track surface temperature in Celsius. Significantly affects tire grip and optimal tire pressure.

wind_kph.description: Wind speed in kilometres per hour

condition.description: Overall track surface condition. 'damp' means drying but not fully dry; 'mixed' means varying conditions across the circuit.

notes.description: Free-text description of conditions not captured by structured fields (e.g. 'Fog in sector 2', 'Strong crosswind on back straight', 'Oil flag at T5')
